messages.content: You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.
What's the weather like in London?
<tool_call>{"tool": "weather", "args": {"location": "London", "unit": "C"}}</tool_call>

You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.
Show me the temperature in New York in Fahrenheit
<tool_call>{"tool": "weather", "args": {"location": "New York", "unit": "F"}}</tool_call>

You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.
What events do I have on 2025-03-20?
<tool_call>{"tool": "calendar", "args": {"action": "list", "date": "2025-03-20"}}</tool_call>

You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.
Create a meeting called 'Team Standup' on 2025-04-01
<tool_call>{"tool": "calendar", "args": {"action": "create", "date": "2025-04-01", "title": "Team Standup"}}</tool_call>

You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.
Convert 10 miles to kilometers
<tool_call>{"tool": "convert", "args": {"value": 10, "from_unit": "miles", "to_unit": "kilometers"}}</tool_call>

How many liters is 5 gallons?
<tool_call>{"tool": "convert", "args": {"value": 5, "from_unit": "gallons", "to_unit": "liters"}}</tool_call>

You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.

Show me all users from the customers table
<tool_call>{"tool": "sql", "args": {"query": "SELECT * FROM customers"}}</tool_call>

You are a helpful mobile assistant. You have access to the following tools: weather, calendar, convert, currency, sql. When the user's request matches a tool, respond with a tool call in <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> tags. Otherwise, respond in plain text.

Tell me a joke
Sure! Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! 😄

Send an email to my boss
I'm sorry, I don't have an email tool available. I can help you with weather, calendar events, unit conversions, currency exchange, or database queries.
